title: Myriad Colors Phantom World
sourceNotes: TV anime (13 eps, 2016, Kyoto Animation) adapts Soichiro Hatano's light novel 'Musaigen no Phantom World'. AniList has no manga-adaptation entry, so this maps to the light novel (id 86401), treating its 3 published volumes as 'chapters' 1-3. The show is largely episodic (a phantom-of-the-week format) with a loose overarching thread around Enigma and the phantom Ruru that pays off late, so volume boundaries are approximate and KyoAni reordered/added original material. Side entries 'Limitless Phantom World' (7 shorts) and the OVA 'The Polka Dot Miracle' are excluded. There are no theatrical films.

mappings.arc: Phantom Sealing Begins (team forms: Haruhiko, Mai, Reina)
Episodic Phantom Cases (Kurumi, Koito & Ruru join)
